hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); printf '%s' "$f" | grep -Eq '((^|/)lib/(site-config|content|contact-schema)\.ts|(^|/)app/\[lang\]/dictionaries/[^/]*\.json|(^|/)app/globals\.css|(^|/)app/actions/contact\.ts)$' && jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"Reminder (linecut-website skill): you edited a Line Cut business-logic/facts file. If business facts, brand voice, design tokens, component conventions, the section recipe, or the roadmap changed, update .claude/skills/linecut-website/SKILL.md in this same change."}}' || true
